title: Cimafunk at SweetWater 420 Fest
location: Georgia World Congress Center, Atlanta, GA
description: Atlanta's premier 420 Fest featuring Cimafunk - the Cuban-American funk sensation. High-energy live music, food trucks, vendors. Great vibes for couples who love live funk and good times.

title: AfroBashment Fridays
description: Atlanta's hottest Afrobeats and Amapiano night. Expect infectious African rhythms, great dancing, and a stylish crowd. Perfect for couples who love to dance and enjoy vibrant nightlife.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
description: Top Atlanta comedians in one show. Laughing Skull is intimate, the drinks are good, and the laughs are guaranteed. 21+ only. Great for couples who appreciate dark humor and a good time.

title: Don't Tell Comedy: Brookhaven
description: Hidden gem comedy show in a casual setting. Surprising lineup and a intimate vibe make this perfect for couples looking for something different and memorable.

title: Can't Even Comedy Show
description: Hip comedy show at the stylish Epicurean Hotel. Upscale setting with great cocktails and laughs. Perfect for a date that balances fun and sophistication.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase (Saturday)
description: Saturday night comedy at its finest. Atlanta's best comics deliver a killer show. Great for couples - laugh together and you're guaranteed a good connection.

title: A Live Response to Unbound Narratives
description: Spelman College Department of Dance performance exploring embodied language through dance. Intellectually stimulating and visually stunning. Perfect cultural date that sparks conversation.

title: Electro Sutra Volume 5
description: Atlanta's most immersive electronic music and cultural experience. Fusion of electronic beats with cultural elements. Great energy, beautiful crowd, perfect for couples who love to dance.

title: PR Experience at City Winery Atlanta
description: Jazz duo featuring trumpeter Nelson Render and trombonist Marvin Pryor with 50+ years combined experience. Intimate wine bar setting - perfect for a romantic date over great wine and live jazz.

title: Jazz on the Rooftop - Virtue Rooftop
description: Weekly Tuesday jazz series with stunning city views. Romantic rooftop setting, craft cocktails, and smooth live jazz. A quintessential Atlanta date night experience.

title: Latin Night at Sebastián Pintxos Bar
description: Salsa lesson followed by salsa and bachata social dancing. Free lesson at 10 PM gets you warmed up, then dance the night away. Great for couples wanting to learn to dance together.

title: Havana Club ATL - Latin Night
description: High-energy Latin nightclub in Buckhead with multiple rooms playing salsa, bachata, merengue, and reggaeton. VIP areas available. Perfect for couples ready to turn up.

title: STAMPED: AYA x Friends - Amapiano & Afrobeats
description: Atlanta's premier Amapiano and Afrobeats party. @MANLIKEAYA and friends deliver an unforgettable afternoon of African rhythms. Outdoor venue, great vibes - perfect for a sundown date.

title: Atlanta Veg Week Kickoff Party
description: Citywide plant-based celebration kickoff at Patagonia. Meet local vegan chefs, sample food, and enjoy good vibes. Great for health-conscious couples looking to explore new cuisines together.

title: Vegan Nights ATL: Taste the City
description: Atlanta's ultimate vegan food festival. Multiple vendors, live music, and an amazing community vibe. Perfect for couples - you can share dishes and discover new favorites together.

title: Jazz in the Sky - Colony Square
description: Atlanta Jazz Festival presents live jazz on top of Colony Square's helipad with breathtaking skyline views. A unique experience that's perfect for a memorable date night.
